product_description: Engaging with the founder community, sharing struggles, and building network.
crisis_comment: Building a startup is a lonely journey with extreme highs and lows. Stay strong, you've got this.
anti_patterns: Don't brag about your own MRR in others' posts

voice_seeds.text: Only founders know how hard this specific phase is. Huge respect for pushing through and shipping this!
Finding product-market fit is a grind. Thanks for sharing the raw reality behind the launch.
